subject: docs(todo): re-audit gap matrix against actual repo code
body:
Audited all 10 downstream repos' actual source code against the
per-repo pattern gap matrix. Found canva-grid and budgy-ting are
significantly more compliant than recorded — both have resolved
most gaps since the original April 6 audit.

Key corrections:
- canva-grid: all 19 gaps (CLAUDE.md, BURGER_MENU, DEBUG_SYSTEM,
  PWA_SYSTEM, Z_INDEX_SCALE) are now Pass, not Partial/Missing
- budgy-ting: 5 of 7 patterns now Pass (CLAUDE.md, APP_ICONS,
  PWA_SYSTEM, THEME_DARK_MODE, Z_INDEX_SCALE)
- see-veo DOWNLOAD_PDF: window.print() button already exists in
  Hero.tsx, only print-color-adjust CSS is still missing
- few-lap: MenuItem interface and clipboard fallbacks already exist
- four-ems: CLAUDE.md inline patterns are ~630 lines, not ~475
- repo-tor: cross-tab sync claim unverified (no storage listener)
- model-pear, graphiki, synctone: all statuses confirmed accurate

Updated gap matrix table, cross-cutting gaps summary, and removed
~100 lines of completed TODO items.

Tags: documentation, audit, patterns, cross-project
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pattern-alignment
Semver: patch
